# Development lineage — B1-RH-ENUM

**Claim**: Reading-H selection within enumerated condensate ensembles  
**Current tier**: T6 (ACTIVE)  
**Notes**: 32 files / 23 note-lineages  ·  **Sub-proofs**: ESTIMATOR-UPGRADE (10), ROBUSTNESS-MU2 (3), Reading-H (3), enumerated (4), near-gap (3)  ·  **Runs**: 17  ·  generated by `build_lineage.py` v1.0.0

> GENERATED FILE — do not hand-edit. Edit `claims/B1-RH-ENUM/lineage-narrative.md` (curated arc) and regenerate.

## Development arc (curated)

B1 establishes the Reading-H selection — the claim that the isotropic
Gaussian–Hartree layer selects Reading H among the enumerated condensate
readings — at T5 (CLOSED@ESTIMATOR-GRADE). The migration chain (M1 batch 1)
revalidated the legacy enumerated-reading evidence (277/277 then 167/167 fresh
asserts, zero diffs).

The 2026-06-06 autonomous T6-mainline session attempted the promotion to
T6-CONDITIONAL once STEP-5B closed (gate consequence): a candidate theorem
"Reading-H selection holds conditional on {H-LAYER, H-A0, H-ADM-COH,
second-cumulant scope}" was assembled (U1), self-audited (U9, which UPHELD the
near-gap small-amplitude objection G-U1-SMALLT), and the repair attempted
(U10/U11). A subsequent verification triage (useries-triage) found the near-gap
endpoint protection margin is ×2, not the ×100 a draft claimed — so the U1
T6-CONDITIONAL proposal is BLOCKED-pending-repair. B1 remains T5; the promotion
is a registered, honestly-blocked proposal, not a closure.

The standalone-publishable results that emerged here are the enumeration /
amended-class cross-check geometry (every enumerated and gallery pattern clears
the H-ADM-COH separation, decagonal star extremal at 0.18% above θ_min) and
the near-gap protection lemma route.

The near-gap blocker was subsequently RESOLVED (2026-06-06): the ×2 the triage saw was a common-mode dressing remainder mis-subtracted as if one-sided. At fixed total intensity the diagonal Hartree dressing is pattern-independent, so competitor and reference share D₀ and the structural floor F[P]≥F[R_H] holds unconditionally (λ′P² is PSD; ln is operator-monotone); the remainder cancels in the difference. R-U10-3 is resolved and the U1 T6-CONDITIONAL proposal is un-blocked on the near-gap axis, pending operator sign-off on the named hypothesis set.

With R-U10-3 resolved, B1 was PROMOTED T5 -> T6 CONDITIONAL on {H-LAYER, H-A0, H-ADM-COH, SC-SCOPE} (operator-authorized, 2026-06-06). The class-wide selection is assembled as a case split: the bulk via the layer margin (Proposition A) plus the beyond-layer bound (STEP-5B closure), and the near-gap small-amplitude corner via the structural floor. The T6 statement is the selection SIGN; the quantitative margins remain estimator-grade (ESTIMATOR-UPGRADE), and the second-cumulant scope (SC-SCOPE) is a substantive named hypothesis because the third-cumulant endpoint corrections are marginal. The promotion passed a five-objection self-adversarial review with no blocker upheld.

ROBUSTNESS-MU2 (the off-anchor neighbourhood, the last residual of the former H-A0) was then ADVANCED, not closed: the sign-decomposition lemmas are mu^2-independent by structure, and the only mu^2-carrying inputs (m*>m_w, M_R>M_c) hold robustly across an order-of-magnitude neighbourhood (mu^2 in [0.001,0.05] = x0.2..x10), the margin m*-m_w cancelling mu^2 exactly. The constants feeding the STEP-5B and layer margins drift only ~1.5% across a x4 band, so those margins are numerically supported off-anchor; their exact re-margining is the narrowed residual that keeps the gate honestly open.

ROBUSTNESS-MU2 was then CLOSED for the mu^2 in [x0.5, x2] neighbourhood: the STEP-5B closure margins, recomputed off-anchor, stay above unity throughout (endpoint x2.55..x2.64, production-intensity ~x59; the margins are monotone increasing in mu^2, so the anchor sits near the thinnest point), the anchor re-margin reproduces the AddE floors, and the Prop-A layer-margin floor is preserved (M_R/M_c > 4.1). Combined with the A=0-uniqueness robustness (x0.2..x10), the selection is no longer pinned to the exact anchor. The last residual of the former H-A0 is thereby retired.
